title: Art Direction Showpiece Game
genericDescription: Establish a coherent visual/audio identity; connect art direction to rules; present production craft.
specificDescription: Build a game where art direction is a central portfolio claim. Include style references, final asset sheet, sound palette, and at least one before/after asset iteration.
gradingRubric: 30 pts art direction; 20 pts integration with play; 20 pts asset quality; 15 pts process evidence; 15 pts presentation.
